name: Flourless Chocolate Mousse Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, place eggs and sugar. Beat together for 3 to 4 minutes, or until the eggs are light in color.
2. Add melted chocolate and coffee. Stir until the mixture is smooth.
3. In another medium bowl, whip the whipping cream until stiff.
4. Gently fold the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture.
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9-inch springform pan.
6. Wrap foil around the bottom and up the sides of the pan to prevent leakage.
7. Place the pan in a large baking pan. Fill the baking pan with hot water until it reaches halfway up the sides of the springform pan.
8. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 1 hour.
9. Turn off the heat and let the cake sit in the oven for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Serve at room temperature or cold. Great with a little vanilla ice cream!
